purpose: Mobile handoff for retrying payment on the same order.

important_notes: The backend creates the payment session.
The frontend must not generate the payment URL manually.
Retry payment works on the same orderId and does not create a new order.
The order stays hidden from the vendor until payment succeeds.

endpoint.body_note: This endpoint does not require a request body. The mobile app only sends the orderId in the path plus the required headers.

path_params.name: orderId
path_params.source_for_mobile: Read it from the selected order item returned by GET /api/orders/active or from GET /api/orders/{orderId}.

steps: Show loading when user taps Retry Payment.
Open payment.iframe_url in WebView or Custom Tab.
Wait for the user to return from the payment flow.
Refresh the order details or active orders list from backend.
Update UI using backend values only.
ui_rules_after_refresh: If payment_status = paid, hide Retry Payment and Delete Order.
If payment_status = failed and can_retry_payment = true, show Retry Payment again.
Never assume payment success before backend refresh.

frontend_must_not: Do not construct Paymob URL manually.
Do not generate payment token locally.
Do not mark the order as paid locally.
Do not create a new order for retry.

ORDER_PAYMENT_RETRY_NOT_ALLOWED: Hide retry button if can_retry_payment becomes false.
